{{Infobox character
| name = Elysian Incarnation
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| introduced = City of Light
}}

''See also: [[Elysian Incarnation Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Elysian]] [[Incarnation]] is the manifestation of the [[Territory]] of [[Elysia]], a role currently held by [[Alin]], the son of [[Torin]]. Originally, the [[Elysian]] [[Travelers]] governed all other [[Territories]] and were responsible for managing any [[Incarnations]] that entered their world. While the [[Travelers]] are regarded as the highest examples of human virtue, the [[Incarnation]] is described as a figure representing morality stripped of conscience or empathy—a ruler possessing absolute power and no self-control. As an [[Incarnation]], [[Alin]] experiences enhanced mental clarity and a complete connection to the [[essence]] of his [[Territory]], embodying traits such as loyalty, wisdom, patience, and bravery. In practice, the [[Incarnation]] has established dominance over the city of [[Enosh]] by dividing it into nine districts and suppressing all opposition. To bolster his power, he has assembled a massive following of [[Travelers]] from various other [[Territories]].}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Elysian]] [[Incarnation]] is an invading force in [[Enosh]], a power so formidable that legends claim [[Queen]] [[Cynara]] sacrificed her [[life]] to fight it. During its campaign, the entity executed [[Grandmaster Helgard]] and led a direct attack against the young nation of [[Damasca]]. Beyond its military might, the [[Incarnation]] manipulated other [[Incarnations]] to further its goals. [[Simon]] seeks to prevent this entity from seizing excessive control, eventually facing the [[Incarnation]] personally while remaining uncertain of its true capabilities.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Legend says [[Queen]] [[Cynara]] gave her [[life]] fighting an [[Elysian Incarnation]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Elysian Incarnation]] is an invading force in [[Enosh]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4">''City of Light'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Elysian Incarnation]] executed [[Grandmaster Helgard]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c5">''City of Light'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Elysian Incarnation]] is an entity that [[Simon]] wants to prevent from taking too much control.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9">''City of Light'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Elysian Incarnation]] is a person [[Simon]] faces.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Elysian Incarnation]] led an attack against the young nation of [[Damasca]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c18">''City of Light'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Elysian Incarnation]] manipulated the other [[Incarnations]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19">''City of Light'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] is unsure of what the [[Elysian Incarnation]] might be capable of.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
